# Behavioral Governance — Tools

Governance tools for adoption rather than prevention. These instruments make decision rights, agent authority, and risk intelligence operational — not just declared.

## Live tools

These are built and available now. Click any to take the diagnostic.

### AI Governance Gap Finder

Six-dimension diagnostic measuring the gap between governance policy and governance practice. Traffic-light scoring across Decision Rights, Agent Authority, Risk Intelligence, Governance Intelligence, 1st-Derivative Talent, and Strategic Coherence. Outputs a board briefing, full report, and JSON.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/governance-gap-finder)**

`ai-tool` · Structured self-assessment artifact · Three-Layer Protocol · v0.1 · *Governance Intelligence*
---
### Decision Rights Quick-Map

Eight-question diagnostic mapping AI decision authority. Outputs Decision Velocity score, Shadow AI Risk rating, and Accountability Clarity. Browser-only, no data stored.

**[Take this tool →](https://paulgibbonsadvisory.com/diagnostics/decision-rights-map)**

`ai-tool` · Structured self-assessment artifact · Decision Rights dimension · v0.1 · *Decision Rights*
---

## In development

Active build, not yet visible on the live site.

- **Portfolio Rationalization Matrix** — Map AI initiatives by value × feasibility. Kill the zombies. *(`canvas`, Strategic Coherence)*
- **Shadow AI Audit** — What AI tools are people using that IT doesn't know about? *(`assessment`, Risk Intelligence)*
- **Skills Gap Analyzer** — Current vs needed skills for AI-augmented roles. *(`assessment`, First-Derivative Talent)*

## Long list

Tools we intend to build (planned) or are evaluating (speculative). See the [full long list](/tools/long-list/) for cross-domain view.

- **Initiative Coherence Scorecard** — Do your initiatives reinforce each other or compete? *(planned · Strategic Coherence)*
- **Authority Escalation Matrix** — When does an AI decision need human sign-off? *(planned · Decision Rights)*
- **Risk Appetite Calibrator** — How much AI risk is your org willing to take? *(planned · Risk Intelligence)*
- **Human-in-the-Loop Decision Tree** — When must a human review AI output? *(planned · Agent Authority)*
- **Agent Guardrails Template** — Per agent: what can it access, modify, escalate? *(planned · Agent Authority)*
- **Workforce Transformation Roadmap** — 12-month roadmap: role analysis → skill mapping → training → measurement. *(planned · First-Derivative Talent)*
- **Policy Effectiveness Tracker** — Are your AI policies changing behavior? *(planned · Governance Intelligence)*
- **Double-Loop Learning Assessment** — Is governance reacting or evolving? *(planned · Governance Intelligence)*
- **Social Frictions-Allies Assessment** — Behavioural mapping of stakeholder dynamics affecting AI adoption — who enables, who blocks, who is affected but unheard. Pilot→prototype→scaling governance layer. *(planned · cross-pillar)*
- *Decision Velocity Diagnostic* — How fast do AI decisions get made? *(speculative · Decision Rights)*
- *Governance Learning Loop Audit* — Single vs double-loop governance learning. *(speculative · Governance Intelligence)*
- *Governance Dashboard* — Board-level governance readout aggregating decision rights, agent authority, risk intelligence, and strategic coherence into a single view. *(speculative · cross-pillar)*
